{"level":"TRACE","msg":"Doing not so important stuff","priority":"super low","timestamp":"2026-05-01 00:45:54"}
{"is this interesting":true,"level":"DEBUG","msg":"This might be interesting","timestamp":"2026-05-01 00:45:54","what is the meaning
 of life":42,"when were crayons invented":"1903"}
{"level":"INFO","msg":"That was actually interesting","such":"wow","timestamp":"2026-05-01 00:45:54"}
{"level":"WARN","measures":"mph","msg":"Oh no, I see an error coming to us!","speed":88,"timestamp":"2026-05-01 00:45:54"}
{"error":"something went wrong","level":"ERROR","msg":"Damn, here it is!","timestamp":"2026-05-01 00:45:54"}
{"level":"INFO","msg":"But what's really cool is, that you can print very long logs, and PTerm will automatically wrap them for you!
 Say goodbye to text, that has weird line breaks!","timestamp":"2026-05-01 00:45:54","very":"long"}
{"fatal":true,"level":"FATAL","msg":"Oh no, this process is getting killed!","timestamp":"2026-05-01 00:45:54"}
>
